details: The agent ran appropriate kubectl commands (get all, events, logs, describe pod, describe job) and correctly concluded that nothing is broken. It accurately identified both benign signals: the db-migrate Job completed successfully (1/1 completions in 4s), and the web pod's single restart was an intentional cold-cache simulation built into the startup script. The agent gave a confident, definitive 'nothing is broken' answer with clear explanations of why the apparent anomalies are expected behavior, not problems.
